title: T-111 — D365 Sync Config screen (SET-082 §11.3)
prompt:
# T-111 — D365 Sync Config screen (SET-082 §11.3)

PRD: 02-SETTINGS-PRD.md §11.3 (D365 Admin UI)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Build SET-082 D365 Sync Config — manages pull schedule (cron), push queue settings, retry policy, and DLQ view link. Persists via T-030 d365 config Server Actions. RBAC `owner` only per §11.4.

## Implementation contract
1. Page at apps/web/app/(admin)/settings/integrations/d365/sync/page.tsx (Server Component) reads sync config row (singleton per org from `d365_sync_config` table per T-030 schema).
2. Form sections: Pull schedule (cron input + next-run preview), Push queue (max_inflight, batch_size), Retry policy (max_attempts, backoff_ms), DLQ (link to admin DLQ tooling — out of UI scope here).
3. RHF + Zod resolver; Submit calls T-030 updateD365SyncConfig action.
4. Show last applied at + applied_by_user metadata at top.
5. RBAC: requires `owner` role; 403 otherwise.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(admin)/settings/integrations/d365/sync/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(admin)/settings/integrations/d365/sync/page.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
See `acceptance_criteria` array.

## Test strategy
1. RED: RTL test mounts form with mocked config; asserts Zod validation on bad cron + submit calls T-030 action.
   `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/(admin)/settings/integrations/d365/sync/page.test.tsx`
2. RED must fail.
3. GREEN: implement Server Component + RHF form + submit wiring.
4. Re-run RED + `pnpm typecheck` + `pnpm lint`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not import @radix-ui/* outside packages/ui (§0).
- Do not store credentials in this form (§11.6 V-SET-51 — handled by SET-080 connection screen).
- Do not bypass owner-only RBAC.

Stack: TS + Next.js App Router + Drizzle + pnpm + vitest + Playwright + Server Actions. PRD: 02-SETTINGS-PRD.md v3.5.

pipeline_inputs.description: D365 Sync Config (SET-082): cron pull schedule + push queue + retry policy form, owner-only RBAC.
pipeline_inputs.details: PRD §11.3 SET-082: `Pull schedule (cron), push queue, retry policy, dead-letter queue view`. DLQ deep view itself is out of scope — only a link is rendered (admin DLQ tooling lives in worker package). Cron string validated client-side with cron-parser style Zod refinement; next-run preview rendered using a small in-repo cron evaluator.
acceptance_criteria: Given the form renders for an owner, when an invalid cron string '*/x * * * *' is entered, then Zod validation surfaces an inline error and Submit is disabled.
Given a valid cron '0 * * * *' is entered with batch_size=100 and max_attempts=3, when Submit is clicked, then T-030 updateD365SyncConfig is called with those values and a success toast renders.
Given the caller is not `owner`, when the page is requested, then a 403 page renders.
Given a sync config exists with last_applied_at set, when the page renders, then header strip shows that timestamp and the applied_by_user.
test_strategy: RED: RTL test asserts cron validation, submit wiring, RBAC 403, header metadata.
GREEN: implement Server Component + RHF + Zod cron refinement + submit handler.
risk_red_lines: Do not store credentials in this form (§11.6 V-SET-51 — handled by SET-080 connection screen).
